meta.seoTitle: Damien Granet — Governance, Communications & International Relations
meta.seoDescription: Damien Granet — governance and communications at Platypus R&D, International Relations (Honours) and PPE at the ANU, and drummer of Bronze Age Collapse.

person.name: Damien Granet
person.headline: Governance & communications officer · International Relations (Honours) at the ANU
person.shortIntro: I work on internal policy, risk and communications at Platypus Research & Development in Canberra, while finishing an honours year in International Relations at the ANU — alongside a completed degree in Politics, Philosophy and Economics. Outside of work you'll usually find me behind a drum kit.

profileImage.alt: Damien Granet grinning with both arms raised outside Cypher Brewing Co.

about: I'm Damien — a Canberra-based governance and communications officer at Platypus Research & Development, where I've worked since late 2023. Day to day that means developing and carrying out internal policy, keeping our WHS and security obligations in order, assessing and mitigating risk, and lending a hand with graphic design and whatever else needs troubleshooting.

Before that I spent a couple of years tutoring — mostly English literature, with some high school maths — both independently and through agencies. For several years I also co-ran Kiwi and Rooster, a small ad hoc food and catering business, with a friend in Sydney.

I'm in the final stretch of an honours year in International Relations at the Australian National University, due to wrap up around October 2026, having already completed a Bachelor of Politics, Philosophy and Economics there. Along the way I've been involved in college life at Burton & Garran and Griffin Hall, the ANU Music Society, the French Collective, and Effective Altruism. When I'm not working or studying, I drum with the Canberra band Bronze Age Collapse.

experience.summary: Internal policy development and execution across the organisation.
details: Develop and implement internal policy, including WHS and Security compliance.
Carry out risk assessment and mitigation.
Provide graphic design and communications support.
General ad hoc troubleshooting and organisational support.

experience.summary: Tutored English literature primarily, along with some high school mathematics.
Co-ran an ad hoc food and catering business with a friend.
Tutored students remotely through KIS Academics.
Tutored students through Big Improvements Tutoring.

education.notes: Currently completing the honours year, with graduation expected at the end of 2026. Activities and societies: Effective Altruism, Burton & Garran Hall, Griffin Hall, ANU Music Society, French Collective.

education.qualification: Bachelor of Politics, Philosophy and Economics
